title: Alarms & Sirens
description: This mod allows your to play simple alarms on your Minecraft world!
body:
**Alarms & Sirens**



**Warning!** This mod is still under HEAVY developement, everything might change, some features aren't done yet.


This mod allows you to play you alarms on your Minecraft world/server.

 

- **How to use alarms?**
1. Take an alarm block in your inventory
2. Place it anywhere in your world
3. Activate it with a redstone imput, like a lever, a button..

- **Credits**
1. MCreator
2. Some AI for the texturing.
